mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (login_id, pw, name, email, phone) VALUES (#{loginId}, #{pw}, #{name}, #{email}, #{phone})

choose.when: SELECT AAA.* FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY created_at DESC) as r, users.* FROM users WHERE login_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') ) AAA WHERE AAA.r BETWEEN #{begin} AND #{end}
SELECT AAA.* FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY created_at DESC) as r, users.* FROM users WHERE phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') ) AAA WHERE AAA.r BETWEEN #{begin} AND #{end}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE login_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%')
